“I swear, if this starts ripping my clothes off, I’m strapping you in this damn thing forever,” you call back, half joking, half serious.
She just laughs. “You’ll be fiiiiine, you’re a Steele. You’re hard as rocks,” she reassures you. Ooo, it wouldn’t be good if she started confusing rocks with metals now...
“If I get sucked into some unknown portal to hell, I’m coming back from the dead and fucking killing you,” you shout back, wide-eyed and paranoid.
She just waves it away. “Such a joker, Steele. This is a great experience!” She exclaims, sounding like a peppy therapist on a caffeine drip.

She’s got the bottle of orange oil in her hands. She wanders over to you, squirting a bit on her left palm. “Now just relax,” she says with a toothy grin, pulling back parts of your [pc.gear] and rubbing the oil over your biceps, [pc.belly], [pc.hips] and [pc.legs]. She seems to be having more fun with that than she lets on... her rough hands feel a helluva lot smoother.
She finishes, her face barely a few inches from your own [pc.face].
“Ready? Gimme 8 reps.”

You nod. She steps back, admiring her work. You begin to push up with the handles and push down with the pads. It’s a bit disconcerting at first but after a few lifts and bends, you find it easy to get into. Still, the sensation of being held in place while your arms and lower half push in opposite directions is new.
You find an internal balance pretty quickly, however. It makes you want to try all the more! But...
This thing is hard. Aside from your neck, the intense rush, burn and strain on your musculature both syncs your limbs together. It does, however, wear them out faster than you expected.
Without the mechanical feedback you’re used to, you adjust to the more floaty sensation of the pads. Combined with your balanced body, your first set of reps go by smoothly, if slowly.
Without the mechanical feedback you’re used to, you have to try hard to adjust to the floating sensation of the pads. Your body handles it well and your reps go down steadily but slowly.

Without the mechanical feedback you’re used to, the sensation is a little wobbly. You find yourself coping with the pads but your body feels a little out of whack. You perform your reps slowly, focusing on technique.

The sensation of the oil is intense. It fills your [pc.skinFurScales] with natural heat and momentum, providing you with the energy you need to keep going. Mirrin’s glancing you over. Her fiery red eyes seem to glow in the dim light of the room.
Once you’ve finished your first set, she just holds up her hand with her fingers spread out and you know she means five more sets...
Here we go!
Having a breather between each set, Mirrin re-applies some of the oil to bits of your body.
She spends a little extra time touching up your [pc.belly], particularly your visible, tensing abs...
She spends a little extra time on your [pc.hips] and [pc.belly]. You feel her claws pulling slightly on your flesh and you’re fairly certain she’s watching out for some sort of jiggling...
The oil is absorbed pretty quickly into your skin so every bit reapplied feels like a fresh, new sensation. Judging by how you’re still able to keep going, it’s doing it’s job.
Suddenly, Mirrin calls “Stop!” and you snap out of your rhythm. You ask if there’s something wrong.
“Ey, no, no... I just want a go,” she says, somewhat envious of the sweat you’ve worked up. “You did good but fuck, I can’t miss this.”
You let go of the handles above you and the hard grip round your middle disappears. Instinctively, you move your body forward but your limbs feel like jelly!
You slip.
And Mirrin lurches forward to catch you.
“Gotcha, gotcha!”

You regain your sense of self, finding yourself clasped tightly against her with her face a few inches from yours. It’s those eyes... your chest flutters. You both lock into each others gaze for a few seconds.
“You okay, [pc.name]?” asks the velvety voiced she-dragon.
“Uhh... yeah,” you nod slowly, unable to break eye contact.
“Uhm... maybe,” you say with a quiver, placing a hand on her arm.
“Just about” you say in a subdued voice, blinking a bit.
“Good,” she says softly, a hard emphasis on the D.
Much like this game in general, huehuehuehuehuehuehue.

She lowers you down in a gentle fashion, enough that you can find your footing on your own. You thank her in turn. Then, she has a fiddle on the control panel. The white cylinder in the gravity field seems to bend and squash into a slightly rounder shape. An alert pops up.
“Warning, loads in excess of 1 Terran Tonne require added supervision.”
“Ignore it,” says a confident Mirrin, stepping onto the hovering pads with her hooves. You get a glimpse of the control panel: It reads 1372.3kg.
Fuck.
She’s already oiled up, it seems. Her black top and shorts are slightly damp from it. She inhales deeply then begins her first push.

It takes her 20 seconds to extend her limbs out fully. Through your tired out vision, her muscles seem to bulge to twice the size! She holds the pose for one second... two seconds... three... four... five...
Scrcchh!
You see her black top burst forward from her chest! Instantly, she lets go of the bars and covers her E-cups. Apparently the failsafe stops everything from crushing people caught in it...
“Shit!” she shouts.
This seems familiar...
She steps off the pads, ventilating quite heavily. A sheen of sweat sticks to her now mostly bare body.
Goddamn, her smoky scent is stronger than ever... there’s that tell-tale twinge in your [pc.groin].
“I am a fucking disaster zone,” she says, somewhat vexed. You keep your eyes away from her chest, even though the temptation is real. She relaxes, putting her hands on her hips.
“Still, how’d it look, Steele?”
“Very, uhm... very impressive,” you say, desperately trying to keep your eyes on her face.
“Breast I’ve seen you do, I mean... best I’ve seen you do,” you say, a little flustered.
“Your form was a little off,” you say, your voice cracking a little on the last syllable. It’s also hard to hide the blush you’ve gained.
Mirrin breaks into a laugh. “You can look, you know,” she grins, jiggling her chest a little. “I’m gonna re-dress, then uh... let’s get grub, [pc.name].”
Hell yeah, tits and steak.
Food!
“Heeey Mirrin, can we do some training?” You ask your dragon trainer.
“Always, Steele,” she replies, eyeing your body all over. “Let’s get you doing the whole works, yes?”

She sets her own weights down and points to the stretching mats. Getting into that familiar stance, you attempt to synchronize with your draconic trainer down to the detail with success. She adapts her speeds and positions for workouts that are comfortable for your bodyshape, spending extra time on working your thighs and glutes...

Then to weights: various types of squats, presses and deadlifts that work both of your upper bodies and midsections. Mirrin gives you extra support when tackling the last few sets, getting a little bit frisky with her hands and fingers on your sweating body. It’s quickly passed off as thorough posture inspection.
Finally, some general cardio and more stretches: A few laps, a few kilometres on the treadmill, with Mirrin’s voice and direction guiding you all the way.
You’re pretty tired out after a few hours of this repeated cycle. You’ve definitely worked up a proper sweat as well!
Next

Hey, maybe a few more years of that, some illegal gene mods and maybe a uhhh, miracle and you might be as good as me, eh?” jokes Mirr...

original: You decline, feeling that you’ve got what you’ve wanted for now. She smiles, says “No worries,” and gets back to her routine. You leave the room with the amazing afterglow from working out.
Next

You both head over to the Barbecue Pit, Mirrin in the lead. The walk is thankfully slow, enough for you to work out the excess energy and acid built up in your [pc.legs]. New Texas is balmy today, a little on the subdued side.
Entering the grill proper,
the chef
Herman

gives you both a wave. Mirrin waves back while you’re scouting for seats. It’s a surprisingly quiet day in the eatery: Aside the sound of sizzling meat, there’s only a few voices around the slightly smoky room. “I got this,” Mirrin says, walking to the BBQ pit with a slight spring in her step. Her hooves make a certain clack on the tiled floor. She holds two fingers up to Herman. He gives her a smiling nod and holds up eight of his own.
You’re seated in a fairly accommodating booth. Probably for the best, given how large the clientele tend to be. Like your dad used to say: ‘Everything’s appropriately sized in New Texas’.
Mirrin saunters over with two beer bottles. She plops one down on your side and slides into the other seat. “Not too long, Steele. You’re gonna love this,” she winks.
Now’s a good a time as any to ask her about your performance.
“Solid, I’d say. Not quite professional level but you know your stuff,” she says calmly, neutral in her tone. “I think we’ll do well, at least.”
“Better than I expected, actually. You’ve got good control, I think we could make this work,” she says with a positive inflection, although her face remains neutral.
“Hmm, don’t think you did badly, but there’s a ways to go,” she says bluntly. “S’alright though, is what you’re here for, yes?”
You’re a little relieved by her appraisal.
“I like your attitude about it too, it’s not just your words but your drive,” she posits, rubbing her nose.
“That extra puff isn’t uhhh, doing much good for you though,” she adds, pinching a bit of your shoulder fat. You’re not sure if you’re comfortable with that...

A ding chimes somewhere and Mirrin reflexively gets up and wanders over to the counter. She comes back with four different, huge, punnets of food balanced in her hands and arms. Placing them down, you see that ho-lee shit, it’s the works: Steak, ribs, fries, salad, all with their own side sauces.

Time to chow down! You both dive into different dishes. Your [pc.lipsChaste] are already wrapping round some sauce slathered ribs, the flame-blasted meat just falling into your mouth. There’s definitely enough to go around for two but you’re watching Mirrin and she’s... really going at it. The sides of her mouth have at least three different sauces dotted around already, and she’s got a chunk of steak resting in between her claws.
“Fuckin’ greatest place in the world,” she says in between mouthfuls.
You beam back at her, sensing a secret shared love:
You encourage her with a few ribs, realizing the shared secret you have:
You eyeroll at her enthusiasm but realize you’re enjoying the same thing:
stuffing juicy meat into your mouth.

There doesn’t seem to be much room to talk: It takes a straight twenty minutes for you to both clear out the food, although Mirrin definitely took the lion’s share. Your body’s going to be angry at you sooner rather than later... and Mirrin’s just out for the count. Slovenly hunched over, it seems she’s had more than she can handle. You wonder if she’s hiding something from you...

“Can’t... fuckin’... ertu að djóka, I’m... so bad,” she says, staring at the empty punnets. She slowly dunks her head on the table, her normally immaculate hair looking frazzled. You almost get grazed by her horns...
Thinking that she’d probably be better off to take a breather before trying to move, you say your goodbyes. She’s laughing to herself but gives you a lazy wave anyway. Back to the ship!
You both make your way over to the grill, a little on the slow side. There aren’t many words said but there’s a few jokes to be made about some shy bull-boys gossiping about Mirrin.

When you enter, it’s at a busy time. The line is quite long and there even appears to be temporary servers dishing out meals. Still, Mirrin just walks up to the counter, gives the same sign to Herman as last time and comes back with two beers.
You find a similar spot to last time, tucked away from most of the crowd. When she slides into her seat, you ask her about how she’s able to get preferred service.

“Oh, uhh... Herman’s a very big fan. Very willing to help a girl out...” she says, giving you a wink. “Same with Quenton actually. You know, as far as low-level business deals go, New Texas has been... accommodating.”
The implication sounds sordid in the least.

“Oh that reminds me, remember this?” She asks, showing you the photo of you two from last time. It seems to have gone through even more stylizing, enough that you’re not even sure if that’s the real you in the picture. “Watch.”
She taps on a few buttons, then puts it down. “Promise, just watch,” she says, a knowing grin on her face.

What sounds like a chorus of various different alerts fills the restaurant. The bulls - and a lot of the cows - pull out various handheld devices and open them up. Being a friendly bunch, they’re all showing each other with saucy grins and whistles.
“Uhm, what did I just see?” You begin, not quite making the connection.
“Hiding in plain sight,” she replies, sniffing at the end of it.
“So what, you’re a hacker too?” You say with a laugh.
She giggles, more feminine than her usual laugh. “No, nooo. But it’s interesting, right?”
“Hm, surprised they even have extranet here,” you say, trying not to sound impressed.
“Oh Steele, so pious,” she chides, then laughs.

“So... everyone’s a little odd around me. At least here, on New Texas. Other planets, ooh, waah, big celebrity, crowd, crowd, crowd,” she begins explaining in her own special way. “But uh... for whatever reasons, very few here want to talk to me. And yet... they all have my social media alerts. I just know that they’re gonna get home or have five minutes in the toilet and just blow their loads over all this,” she says, pointing up and down her frame.
How curious, you posit. There’s not much more that can be said in time as the food arrives.

“Aw, all this beef,” says a woozy Mirrin. It’s mostly the same as the last meal you had with her but the fries appear to be covered in some sort of cheese and gravy. You deal out a generous portion for yourself and tuck in.
Mirrin seems to be eating slower than last time. You ask her about the sudden change.

She stops mid-steak. “Ey, so... obviously being this uhhh, jacked, you need pure physical matter to build yourself with. Buuut... I was also a compulsive eater when I was younger. Eh, I’m good at maintaining myself but I can just... eat and eat, until it comes back to bite me,” she says, a little embarrassed. She even puts down her fingerful of diced steak.
“Gah, what kind of personal trainer gorges in front of her client, eh? Enough for me,” she concedes, downing a big glug of beer.
“I guess we’re both getting something out of this, right?” You say to her, taking a swig with her.
She eyes you for a second then raises her bottle. “Hmm... good point, Steele. Cheers!”
“That’s right, you gotta be my role model, you slob,” you joke, raising your bottle to her.
“One of these days, Steele,” she sighs, clinking her bottle with yours.
“Maybe you’ve got more to learn than I do,” you say, throwing back a swig of beer.
“Jeez, you’re such a... kúkalabbi,” she smiles, waving your statement away.

You finish off your fill of food in a short while, the weight of all that deliciously grilled meat slowing your body and mind right down. Mirrin’s finished too, just idly fiddling around with her dataslate while sipping on a last bit of beer.

After a day of emptying and then filling yourself again like the confusing person you are, you decide it’s time to return to the ship. You wave goodbye to your trainer. “See ya, Steele,” she says back, vaguely gesturing a wave with her hand.

Although it’s all gone by, you both joke about the exploding bikini while you amble down to the Barbecue Pit. It’s made Mirrin more open and less aloof, you surmise, especially by the way she’s laughing at every joke - lame or otherwise - that you put forward.
She’s particularly enthralled about the time you got confused for the main character from a time-revered Terran porn novel.

The eatery seems to be chugging along regularly today, even though there appears to be several trysts floating around the back of the room. Mirrin makes her usual gesture, Herman signaling back with a gesture you’ve never seen him do before. Hmm...
Finding a more open table closer to the serving counter, you immediately feel compelled to talk about today’s...happenings.

“Jeez, I don’t mind the whole clothes thing it’s just... feeling all those bull’s eyes staring at us. Like holy shit, not everyone just gets their rocks off of as soon as they get their clothes off, you know?” She starts, keeping a grin on her face.

“Hmm, explains why there were loads of them though... see that bikini was a new model, very expensive, very exclusive. I was lucky to land that contract. Obviously, suppliers fucked up, doesn’t fit me at all. At least I got something to show the fans though.”
She shows you a picture of that pose where her meatsticks dangled very close to your mouth.
You pull a very embarrassed, flushed red face, crossing your arms close to your [pc.chest]. “Jeez, I can’t believe you kept that...” you timidly respond.
She girlishly giggles - a rare thing for her - eyeing you while she rests her head on her palm. “You’re adorable like that,” she teases.
“And send,” she says out loud, tapping on her dataslate.
“Oh my FUCK...” you blurt out with exasperation, proceeding to bury your head in your arms on the table.
Mirrin lets out a big belly laugh. “Baha! Your fokking face! So precious!”
“And send,” she says out loud, tapping on her dataslate. Great.
“Oh you are not putting that online,” you angrily say back, pointing right at her.
“Already trendiiiing,” she chimes melodiously, shaking the device in her hand. You slouch back with your head in your hands. “Aw, you’re so cute like that, Steele...” she teases.

There’s a ding and a cow-server comes by with food. She gives you both a wink, presenting just two big punnets of food: More cheesy gravy fries but also what looks like huge slab of pulled pork smothered in a dark glaze.
“Eat up, babes,” she winks to you both, then trots off with a wiggle of her hips.
Mirrin is sitting there slack jawed. “Hoooo... ly shit. I just... dibs!” she calls out, stabbing it in the side with a disposable fork.
So much for last session’s restraint...
You jump into the substantially overstacked meal, the smoky sauce glaze is particularly friendly to your nose.
Something about it reminds you of the indescribably rich musk of your dragon trainer. Ooo, if only you could get that close again...
Aside the sounds of enthusiastic noshing, you don’t say much to each other: This slab of juicy, thick meat just feels so good in your mouth!
Mirrin finishes a mouthful. “Just gonna grab another uhhh, beer, [pc.name],” she says, twirling a finger.
She gets her brewski quickly enough but a group of three shirtless bulls suddenly stand in her way. Huh... you cautiously get up to get a better look.

“Heeeey, darlin’,” you hear the biggest of the three say, a heavily bearded and bald alpha bull who’s only a few inches taller than Mirrin. He’s pretty much a beef mountain by the looks of things, a small pair of shorts being his only bit of clothing.
“Me an’ the boys saw that there picture of you an’ yer friend over there,” he says, eyeing you from behind Mirrin.

“We got ta thinkin’: bet a she-bull like you ain’t had a proper ride! I’m sure ya friend has done you right afore but "+{var0}.mf("he","she")+" can’t give you what we got: Pure Texas beef™, URNGH!” he boasts, posing with his chiseled guns.

original: He’s a proper bull alright and you’d be pulling down those useless shorts there and then if you could, just go get a taste...
“Yeah, that’sa spirit, Doug!” says a random voice behind him.
Mirrin just stands there, leaning on a forward thrusted hoof. Her look is one of sheer incredulity. She places her bottle back on the counter.
“Uh, whatsaname... Doug? Listen to me, Doug,” she begins, a feigned note of friendliness in her voice. She slaps a particularly quick hand onto the bull’s bulging shoulder. He’s still smiling.
“Here’s the thing...”
You see her slowly squeeze, claws dug into his muscle.
“Sure, that sort of thing could work on any respectable cow...”
Very visibly, his arm seems to tense and spasm. His face is contorted in pain and the speechless bull is gradually sinking to the floor.
“But you certainly” - did she just growl? “are not on my level. Take your friends...”
He’s on his knee, desperately clutching at her unmoving, locked fingers.
“And fuck right off.”
She lets go and instantly, the defeated bull staggers back with him and his cohorts backing out of the restaurant. Wow.
The room has mostly turned quiet but Herman calls out “Nothin’ ta see, folks! Come getcha grub!”
Normalcy ensues.
Grabbing her beer, she swaggers back over to you with a look of pride. She slides into her seat like nothing happened. You follow her.
“So...” she says, hand on beer.
“Are... you alright? Is he alright?” You inquire, a little anxious.
She looks at you with somewhat tired eyes. “Mmm, don’t worry about me. Or him, actually. It’s fine, [pc.name],” she says with a weak grin.
“Jeez... you could crush a brick with those hands,” you say with a hint of awe.
“Not could; can,” she says with a wink. “He’ll be fine though, just something he’ll feel for a few days.”
“Are you insane? You could’ve ripped his damned arm off,” you say, mixing concern with disbelief.
“Literally asking for it,” she says, downing her beer. “Or not literally. Whichever.”

She flares her nose and inhales deeply. “Guy deserved it though. Don’t go mixing horny and dumbass, else that happens. Thankfully, New Texas is mostly just horny,” she opines with a smirk. “Hmm, although... sometimes those uhhh, amazon types are just begging for a fist. Especially that Zephyr nutjob or whatever her name is.”
You’re not sure on what version of ‘fist’ she means.
Slurp “You know, I turned down her arm wrestle thing and she got super pissy. Eh, fuck it though,” she finishes, leaving her empty bottle on the table.
“Sorry you had to see that, Steele. All good?”
You nod, although you might have to talk more about it later. You say your goodbyes and leave for the ship.

Your fun with the weird weights machine has left the both of you tired. Mirrin is back in her casual white bikini and shorts combo, her hoofsteps noticeably slow and a little unbalanced. Guess she’s not completely immortal...
The grill seems surprisingly quiet again, although some sort of music plays in the background. It sounds like old Terran country... hey, at least it’s thematic.

You’re not feeling so hot after the gravity machine of the gods or whatever it was messed with your sense of bodily awareness. Something easy on the stomach today, you suggest to Mirrin. She nods, idly rubbing her biceps.
You find a familiar spot to sit in, the usual exchange between Mirrin and Herman going off without incident this time. Your [pc.belly] feels quite strained from today so you slouch a bit.

Mirrin comes back with what appears to be two cocktails. “Just something to say how cool today was. I don’t think the public’s going to use that machine for months,” she says with some relief. You get the feeling that she’s more worn out from the test than she’s letting on.
“Hey, listen for sec, I-”
Her speech is interrupted by the shadow of a large figure from behind.
“Heya, she-bull. Figured you’d be showin’ up round here,” says a vaguely threatening, familiar voice. It’s that dumbass Doug from before.
“Ahh, is just not my day...” sighs your
qilin friend.
dragon trainer.
She slowly rises to meet his eye level.
“So what is it uhh, Doog? Need a shoulder massage?” she sasses. “I mean, I am pretty handy after all.”
She raises said left hand, inspecting each hooked claw in front of Doug’s full view.

“I ain’t one to back down from a challenge no matta’ how tall the order,” he boasts, grandstanding to the mostly empty restaurant. “You just playin’ hard ta get, like all them uppiteh amazawns round heeyuh! No one can resist this absolute artistry of muscle and POWAH, UNGHH!”

His friends pat him on the back in agreement. “Now listen, she-bull. I can forgive ya. Lil’ bruisin on the arm ain’t nothin’ for this bronco. But,” he stops, placing his right hand on Mirrin’s shoulder.
Uh oh...

She slowly turns her head to look at his hand, and then to Doug’s shit-eating grin. Her face is livid. And... that sound is there, that deep, throaty rumble that you’ve only heard in truly mammoth creatures on the verge of crushing small furry mammals.
Out of nowhere, she suckerpunches him right in the guts!

The effect is immediate. He buckles over her fist, grasping for something to hold on to. There’s no visible damage but his buddies go paramedic on the disabled bull. Only just able to hold himself up, he tries saying something even though he’s thoroughly winded. “Lucky... shot...”
The three ne’er-do-wells hightail out of the eatery with the incapacitated Doug having to slowly limp out the door.
Mirrin’s still visibly fuming. “Fucking... fucking... fucking...” you can hear her fume under her breath. Well, you have to say something!
“Mirrin...? You’ve done all you need...” you meekly say, placing a hand on her hip from behind. You can feel the raw tension in her muscles.
“Heeeey, big girl... time to reign it in,” you say with a light-hearted tone. You place a hand on her hip. Even in that spot, you can feel the tension.
“That’s enough. He’s not coming back,” you say sternly, conveying authority. You slowly place your hand on her hip.
She turns to you, her posture relaxing when she looks at you
at eye level.
from above.
She places a hand on your face, an affectionate look in her eyes. It only lasts for a moment. Abruptly, she starts walking to the door.
“I have to go, I-I don’t want...”
You decide that it’s best not to follow her.
Food it is!
You both head out towards the Barbecue Pit as per usual, discussing the day’s session and areas of improvement along the way.

“You’re doing pretty great, you know! I think now you should work on keeping yourself sculpted and... yeah, just as trim and uh... you know,” she opines, getting distracted by some random thought. “That word I was thinking of, uhhh, sexy, that was it.”

original: “Not bad for today, I’d still like to see some improvement from you. It’s uuuhhh, working for you though,” she states, giving you a thumbs up.
Nice!
Once you’re both inside and have found a reasonably quiet place to sit, Mirrin orders up some grub and beers. Gotta regain all that energy again somehow!

It comes in very little time and the sounds of eating and slurping take over the conversation. The both of you are determined to lay waste to the spread of grilled meats before you, this little routine having been driven into you enough that it’s impossible to say no.
It takes a good 20 minutes for you to get through it all and once again, Mirrin takes the bigger portion. It’s just a thing you’ve accepted now.
Once you’re both full and had a breather, you bid each other goodbye with a grub-stuffed she-dragon lazing against the couch.
Next
“Well, I don’t know much about you,” you begin, leaning against a nearby pillar. “Start from the top, I guess?”
Scratching the underside of her jaw, she begins “So, the name is Mirrin Arkosduttir,” and
you already need a second to process the jumble of syllables into a name you can repeat. “Arkos...duttir?” You say under your breath.
you immediately blank at the deluge of unfamiliar sounds coming out. “Wha...?” You say with an open mouth.

She grins, stifling a laugh through her nose. “Yah, yah I know. So like, my father’s name was Arkos Arkossonne and where I grew up, you take the uhh, paternal name first and change it for gender. So, I’m Arkosduttir,” she explains, taking a second to find the right word.

“Anyway,” she continues, resting her elbows on her knees, “so technically I’m... Terran, I suppose. Born there, raised there, schooled there and also very happily left there.” She flares her nostrils and takes a swig of water from a closeby bottle.

“Not quite all of it. My mother, father? Other father... no, mother,” is what she finally gets to, punctuating each title with a finger gesture. “She’s gryvain. Hence uhhh, most of this,” she grins, pointing from her top to her bottom. You follow those movements with your eyes, another opportunity to get a good look at her imposing structure up close.

“Childhood didn’t suck, although father was usually... not there. He was rich as hell come to think of it but apparently industrial building supplies ‘make the bread’,” she explains, that last butchered phrase making you raise an eyebrow.
“He was alright, I guess. My mother... kind of the same. Money does things, you know?” She looks at you for affirmation.
You, of course, couldn’t imagine a life without all that sweet, sweet money from daddy but you nod away in agreement.

You think to the stories of your own dad gallivanting about space, getting junked up on mods and easy lays, desperately wishing that ‘special’ childhood could be conveyed in the straight faced nod you give her.

“Yah, so” swig “being a Terran-mongrel in a fancy Terran school for Terrans was fun,” comes the sarcastic blurb, her arm closest to you flexing and contracting as if to work off some tension. “Were you ever 6' tall at twelve years old, covered in scales and able to rip down a fucking wall in your teens?” She seems to sincerely ask, nostrils flared. The grip from her red-scaled, clawed hand seems to be a little tighter on that water bottle.

Mirrin seems quite agitated, most likely due to the incident at the grill earlier. She suddenly drops her barbell mid rep, the very heavy object making a booming noise as it hits the dampening material below. At the same time, she buckles over somewhat and lets out a vicious roar. Not merely a shout, but a roar! Gryvain genes...
Ignoring the genuinely perturbed gym-goers around, you stand right behind her,
placing a hand on her shoulder.
tapping her on the arm.
<i>“We should talk about this,
I’m worried about you,
you’re scary when you’re mad,
you’re causing a goddamn scene,
” you say, hoping that she’ll relent.
<i>“Fancy a break?
I wanna know more about my personal trainer,” you probe, scratching the back of your head.
I gotta tap that big ol’ head of yours,” you tease, matching her gaze with your own.
Your posture’s slipping, you should have one,” you say firmly, arms folded.
“Alright, cute stuff” she replies with a faint smile, finishing her last rep.
She stops mid rep. She raises an eyebrow, grins and then rolls her eyes. “Sure thing, champ,” she says.
She inhales sharply through her nose, stops mid rep and looks at your reflection. “Might be right actually,” she replies.
She places the barbell on the floor with a dull vumff then takes a big glug of water.
“Chat for a bit?” she shrugs, taking a seat on a bench press nearby, said bench press creaking a little underneath her.
You decide against it at the last second, hoping she’ll understand.
“Bjáni, why bring it up if... fiiine. Ok, no matter, no worries. If and when, just talk to me about it,” she says, blowing out a huff of air at your indecision. “Back to it, I think.”
The hulking she-dragon hauls her barbell back onto her shoulders and begins a new routine.
You give her a goodbye, to which she gives you a wink in the mirror. You then leave the gym for new journeys.

“Uh, y-yeah...” you confirm with an awkward foot shuffle. “So maybe we could start off from before? If you feel the same, of course.”

You hold your hand up to get her attention.

“Actually, Mirrin, I’ve thought it over too. I really dig our time together, but you’re very much my friend first. Couldn’t we just, ya know... keep doing what we were doing?” you say warmly, trying the ‘just friends’ angle.

“Woah woah, hold on there big girl! I’ve had a think too and really, I just wanna bro down with my kickass qilin friend. Sorry if I sent the wrong signals,” you say sheepishly, trying to hold an awkward smile.
“Wait, stop. I’ve given it some thought and I’m much more into the whole ‘us being friends’ thing. So, I would rather not ruin that with romantic endeavours,” you say flatly and bluntly.
The she-dragon holds her breath, then smacks her palm to her forehead with a laugh.

“Fucking... I did it again, huh? Kind of dragged you around doing this uhh, ‘mixed signals’ shit. Yeah, you know, I get it! I do get it. I’m sorry if it seemed that way but now, I figure that we’re both happier knowing what’s what, huh?” she thinks aloud, her muscular frame visibly relaxing before you.
Nice!

“Alright, well all this prepping means I’m a little uhhhh, pent up right now so... come back tomorrow and we can do whatever, you know? Weights, food, drinks, blah blah,” she says, heartily slapping your shoulder.
Double nice!
Brotacular!
Shablagoo!
Ah jeez, that shoulder hurts a bit now...
She waves you goodbye, a satisfied smile on the she-dragon’s face. You do too, intent on going about your business.

“You kinda know what I’m going to ask, right? So you know it can’t be said until... yeah. Sorry, this is all a bit messy in my head,” she says with a sigh, her palm against her forehead, “you need to get it checked, whatever it is. Need. To. Then you come back and we talk.”

You nod with a reflexive smile on your face. Quite awkward. You got this though, it’s just a quick visit to a clinic, right? Few shots in the arm and all that. With this in mind, you turn away from her glare - one with a twitch in her cheeks and purse of the lips - and walk away as if no one was paying attention.

“And I guess I never talked about some other things. Did you know I’m 38 next year? This kind of life breezes by when you hit a number like that. Like, I never even remembered until dad mailed me a few days ago to uhhh, say things about my birthday,” she continues, her nervousness giving way to relief as she talks.
38, huh? You tell her she barely looks out of her mid twenties. A little bit of you regrets saying something so cheesy.
She just chuckles and pats the back of your hand.

“Yeah, I know what you’re trying to say, you... flatterer, you. Probably doesn’t even matter, I might not get ‘old’ old until I’m like a century and a half or some shit. Gryvain nonsense, you know? Hah! But anyway, I guess the human part of me is getting... needy.”
She pauses, carefully choosing her words.
“I want to have a baby.”
Ohhh. Oh, wow.
“With you, elskan,” she adds, turning her gaze to address you with a hopeful grin.
Definitely has got your attention. It’s a bit of a curveball and you can only give it a quick mulling over: sure, it’s a bit flippant but it’s perfectly doable.
You’ve done it before, anyway!
And getting bred by a beast of a she-dragon like her...
or actually breeding her for that matter.
You ask her for more details, specifically about who’s actually doing the impregnating.
You imagine that the answer will be simple and obvious given your particular ‘organ’ arrangement.

“Well me, of course! And I’d make it so special for you. I’ve got new toys and all these things... but at the same time, it could always be you, perhaps,” she says, enthusiasm giving way to a sly wink.
“Well me, of course! And I’d make it so special for you. I’ve got new toys and all these things,” she says, leaning in a little closer to you.

“Ehh... might be problematic. On the inside, I’m aching for it but... is it going to ruin all this?” she sighs, gesturing to her sculpted, iron-hard abs and then to her breasts for some reason. “I don’t know. This is why my bet hedging failed.”

“Don’t rush for an answer though, it’s a big thing. Well, it’s big for me, anyway. I know that you’ve probably had who knows how many children and all the trust funds that Daddy Steele had, yadda yadda...”

“But yeah, don’t say anything yet, think it over. Come back whenever and we’ll... go with what you want,” she finishes, giving you a peck on the cheek. “Didn’t want to make it too big a thing so... I should get back to it, got some clothes to, uhhh, avoid shredding. Find me around later.”
You nod, giving her arm a squeeze for a goodbye. Mirrin hurriedly stands up and slowly walks over to the locker rooms, waving you on your way.
With some life-altering food for thought, you take your leave.
